skills.name: morning-briefing
skills.description: Daily morning briefing with email summary and tasks
skills.long_description: Runs every morning at 7 AM or on demand. Checks your unread emails and todo list, then creates a concise briefing to start your day.
skills.author: KekwanuLabs

skills.name: email-triage
skills.description: Triage and prioritize unread emails by urgency
skills.long_description: Categorizes your unread emails by urgency: urgent, important, FYI, or skip. Gives you a one-sentence action item for each.
skills.author: KekwanuLabs

skills.name: smart-search
skills.description: Search the web and synthesize a clear answer
skills.long_description: Searches the web for your question and synthesizes the results into a clear, sourced answer. Requires Brave Search API.
skills.author: KekwanuLabs

skills.name: weekly-review
skills.description: Weekly review of emails, tasks, and activity
skills.long_description: Runs Friday evenings or on demand. Summarizes your week, highlights loose ends, and suggests focus areas for next week.
skills.author: KekwanuLabs

skills.name: focus-mode
skills.description: Minimize interruptions and batch notifications for deep work
skills.long_description: Tells Crayfish to stop proactive notifications and keep responses ultra-brief. When you end focus mode, you get a summary of what you missed.
skills.author: KekwanuLabs

skills.name: quick-capture
skills.description: Save a thought, idea, or note to memory quickly
skills.long_description: Say 'remember this' or 'note to self' and Crayfish saves it to memory. Quick and natural — no forms, no apps.
skills.author: KekwanuLabs

skills.name: meeting-prep
skills.description: Prepare for your next meeting with context from email and calendar
skills.long_description: Pulls your upcoming calendar events and searches email for related threads. Gives you talking points and open action items before you walk in.
skills.author: KekwanuLabs

skills.name: email-autoresponder
skills.description: Draft quick replies to emails that need a response
skills.long_description: Reviews unread emails and drafts short replies for ones that clearly need a response. You approve each draft before anything gets sent.
skills.author: KekwanuLabs

skills.name: daily-journal
skills.description: Evening journal prompt to reflect on your day
skills.long_description: Runs at 9 PM or on demand. Looks at what happened today and asks thoughtful questions to help you reflect. Saves your reflections to memory.
skills.author: KekwanuLabs

skills.name: expense-tracker
skills.description: Find receipts and purchase confirmations in your email
skills.long_description: Searches your email for receipts, order confirmations, and invoices. Summarizes recent spending grouped by category.
skills.author: KekwanuLabs

skills.name: reminder-set
skills.description: Set a reminder and get nudged when it's time
skills.long_description: Say 'remind me to...' and Crayfish saves it to memory and your todo list. Simple and natural.
skills.author: KekwanuLabs

skills.name: day-planner
skills.description: Plan your day based on calendar, todos, and email
skills.long_description: Combines your calendar, todo list, and urgent emails into a realistic day plan. Accounts for meetings and suggests what to tackle between them.
skills.author: KekwanuLabs

skills.name: email-followup
skills.description: Find emails you sent that never got a reply
skills.long_description: Cross-references your sent emails against your inbox to find unanswered threads. Suggests who to follow up with and drafts a nudge.
skills.author: KekwanuLabs

skills.name: schedule-finder
skills.description: Find free time in your calendar for a new meeting or task
skills.long_description: Shows your available time slots for the next 5 days. Highlights best blocks for focused work vs quick meetings.
skills.author: KekwanuLabs

skills.name: news-digest
skills.description: Get a quick news summary on any topic
skills.long_description: Searches the web for the latest news on a topic and creates a 3-5 story digest with sources. Requires Brave Search API.
skills.author: KekwanuLabs

skills.name: email-unsubscribe
skills.description: Find newsletters and subscriptions cluttering your inbox
skills.long_description: Scans your inbox for newsletters, notifications, and marketing emails. Helps you decide what to keep, unsubscribe from, or auto-archive.
skills.author: KekwanuLabs

skills.name: contact-recap
skills.description: Get a recap of all interactions with a specific person
skills.long_description: Searches your email and memory for everything related to a person. Shows who they are, recent conversations, and open threads.
skills.author: KekwanuLabs

skills.name: standup-report
skills.description: Generate a standup report from yesterday's activity
skills.long_description: Runs weekday mornings or on demand. Creates a copy-pasteable standup with yesterday's accomplishments, today's plan, and blockers.
skills.author: KekwanuLabs

skills.name: family-briefing
skills.description: Morning family briefing — today's schedule, action items, and heads-up
skills.long_description: Runs every morning at 6 AM or on demand. Pulls calendar, todos, and emails to create a warm, scannable family briefing with today's schedule, upcoming heads-ups, and action items.
skills.author: KekwanuLabs

skills.name: family-context
skills.description: Always-on family awareness — makes every conversation family-smart
skills.long_description: A prompt skill that makes Crayfish think like a trusted family friend. Automatically considers schedules, dietary needs, kid logistics, and budget when planning anything.
skills.author: KekwanuLabs

skills.name: family-setup
skills.description: Guided family onboarding — get to know the family through conversation
skills.long_description: A warm, conversational onboarding flow that learns about your family members, schedules, dietary needs, routines, and preferences. Saves everything to memory for other family skills.
skills.author: KekwanuLabs

skills.name: weekly-planner
skills.description: Sunday evening weekly overview — the week at a glance with prep notes
skills.long_description: Runs Sunday at 8 PM or on demand. Creates a whiteboard-style weekly overview with day-by-day events, busy day flags, quiet windows for errands, and prep reminders.
skills.author: KekwanuLabs

skills.name: bedtime-routine
skills.description: Tomorrow preview — quick prep list and tomorrow at a glance for bedtime
skills.long_description: Runs Sun-Thu at 9 PM or on demand. A quick bedtime preview with tonight's prep tasks and tomorrow's schedule at a glance. Designed to take 15 seconds to read.
skills.author: KekwanuLabs

skills.name: meal-planner
skills.description: Weekly meal planning with grocery list — family-friendly, schedule-aware
skills.long_description: Creates a weekly meal plan matched to your family's busyness level each day. Includes weeknight dinners, weekend meals, a batch cook tip, and a grocery list organized by store section.
skills.author: KekwanuLabs

skills.name: school-emails
skills.description: School communication filter — surfaces action items from school emails
skills.long_description: Searches your email for school-related messages and organizes them into action required, upcoming events, and FYI categories. Uses your kids' names from memory.
skills.author: KekwanuLabs

skills.name: church-schedule
skills.description: Church and faith community schedule — services, groups, and events
skills.long_description: Shows your church or faith community schedule including services, groups, volunteering commitments, and upcoming events. If no church info is saved, guides you through setup.
skills.author: KekwanuLabs

skills.name: shabbat-planner
skills.description: Shabbat preparation — candle lighting, dinner menu, and Friday timeline
skills.long_description: Helps Jewish families prepare for Shabbat with candle lighting times, dinner menu suggestions, a Friday prep timeline, and havdalah. Respects different levels of observance and learns family customs.
skills.author: KekwanuLabs

skills.name: prayer-times
skills.description: Islamic daily prayer times — salah schedule, conflicts, and Ramadan notes
skills.long_description: Shows today's five daily prayer times (Fajr, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, Isha), flags calendar conflicts, and includes Ramadan suhoor/iftar times when relevant. Supports multiple calculation methods.
skills.author: KekwanuLabs

skills.name: devotional
skills.description: Daily spiritual reflection — reading, intention, and gratitude for any faith
skills.long_description: A gentle morning devotional with a daily reading, brief reflection, intention for the day, and gratitude moment. Adapts to any faith tradition or works as a non-denominational reflection.
skills.author: KekwanuLabs

skills.name: trip-research
skills.description: Family trip research — destination overview, hotels, flights, and budget
skills.long_description: Comprehensive trip research for families. Searches for activities, hotels, and flights, then creates a trip brief with destination overview, where to stay, what to do, and budget estimates.
skills.author: KekwanuLabs

skills.name: trip-itinerary
skills.description: Day-by-day trip itinerary — relaxed family-paced planning with downtime
skills.long_description: Creates a relaxed day-by-day itinerary with one major activity per half-day, meal suggestions, and rainy day backups. Designed for families who need breathing room, not a packed tourist schedule.
skills.author: KekwanuLabs

skills.name: trip-prep
skills.description: Trip preparation — packing lists, timelines, and logistics checklists
skills.long_description: Creates a timeline checklist (2 weeks to day-of), personalized packing lists by family member, documents checklist, and a don't-forget list. Can save everything as a checkable packing todo list.
skills.author: KekwanuLabs
